targets.rawSql:
WITH latest_snapshot AS (
  SELECT max(snapshot_date) AS snapshot_date
  FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily
)
,
    stock_status AS (
      SELECT
        s.warehouse_id,
        s.sku_id,
        coalesce(w.warehouse_name, s.warehouse_id) AS warehouse,
        coalesce(p.sku_name, s.sku_id) AS sku_name,
        coalesce(p.category, 'Unknown') AS category,
        coalesce(p.brand, 'Unknown') AS brand,
        s.on_hand_qty,
        s.available_qty,
        s.reserved_qty,
        p.reorder_point,
        p.max_stock,
        round(s.inventory_value, 2) AS inventory_value,
        multiIf(
          s.available_qty <= 0, 'Stockout',
          p.reorder_point > 0 AND s.available_qty < p.reorder_point, 'Low stock',
          p.max_stock > 0 AND s.available_qty > p.max_stock, 'Overstock',
          'Healthy'
        ) AS stock_status
      FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily s
      LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product p ON p.sku_id = s.sku_id
      LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_warehouse w ON w.warehouse_id = s.warehouse_id
      WHERE s.snapshot_date = (SELECT snapshot_date FROM latest_snapshot)
        AND ('${warehouse:raw}'='__all' OR s.warehouse_id IN (${warehouse:singlequote}))
        AND ('${region:raw}'='__all' OR w.region IN (${region:singlequote}))
        AND ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR p.category IN (${category:singlequote}))
        AND ('${brand:raw}'='__all' OR p.brand IN (${brand:singlequote}))
        AND ('${sku:raw}'='__all' OR s.sku_id IN (${sku:singlequote}))
    )

            SELECT stock_status, count() AS sku_count
            FROM stock_status
            WHERE ('${stock_status:raw}'='__all' OR stock_status IN (${stock_status:singlequote}))
            GROUP BY stock_status
            ORDER BY sku_count DESC

WITH latest_snapshot AS (
  SELECT max(snapshot_date) AS snapshot_date
  FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily
)
SELECT
  coalesce(w.warehouse_name, w.warehouse_id) AS warehouse,
  countIf(
    ('${stock_status:raw}'='__all' OR 'Low stock' IN (${stock_status:singlequote}))
    AND p.reorder_point > 0
    AND s.available_qty < p.reorder_point
  ) AS low_stock_items
FROM inventory_mart.dim_warehouse w
LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily s
  ON s.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id
  AND s.snapshot_date = (SELECT snapshot_date FROM latest_snapshot)
LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product p
  ON p.sku_id = s.sku_id
WHERE ('${warehouse:raw}'='__all' OR w.warehouse_id IN (${warehouse:singlequote}))
  AND ('${region:raw}'='__all' OR w.region IN (${region:singlequote}))
  AND ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR p.category IN (${category:singlequote}))
  AND ('${brand:raw}'='__all' OR p.brand IN (${brand:singlequote}))
  AND ('${sku:raw}'='__all' OR s.sku_id IN (${sku:singlequote}))
GROUP BY warehouse
ORDER BY low_stock_items DESC, warehouse

WITH latest_snapshot AS (
  SELECT max(snapshot_date) AS snapshot_date
  FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily
)
,
    stock_status AS (
      SELECT
        s.warehouse_id,
        s.sku_id,
        coalesce(w.warehouse_name, s.warehouse_id) AS warehouse,
        coalesce(p.sku_name, s.sku_id) AS sku_name,
        coalesce(p.category, 'Unknown') AS category,
        coalesce(p.brand, 'Unknown') AS brand,
        s.on_hand_qty,
        s.available_qty,
        s.reserved_qty,
        p.reorder_point,
        p.max_stock,
        round(s.inventory_value, 2) AS inventory_value,
        multiIf(
          s.available_qty <= 0, 'Stockout',
          p.reorder_point > 0 AND s.available_qty < p.reorder_point, 'Low stock',
          p.max_stock > 0 AND s.available_qty > p.max_stock, 'Overstock',
          'Healthy'
        ) AS stock_status
      FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily s
      LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product p ON p.sku_id = s.sku_id
      LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_warehouse w ON w.warehouse_id = s.warehouse_id
      WHERE s.snapshot_date = (SELECT snapshot_date FROM latest_snapshot)
        AND ('${warehouse:raw}'='__all' OR s.warehouse_id IN (${warehouse:singlequote}))
        AND ('${region:raw}'='__all' OR w.region IN (${region:singlequote}))
        AND ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR p.category IN (${category:singlequote}))
        AND ('${brand:raw}'='__all' OR p.brand IN (${brand:singlequote}))
        AND ('${sku:raw}'='__all' OR s.sku_id IN (${sku:singlequote}))
    )

            SELECT count() AS value
            FROM stock_status
            WHERE ('${stock_status:raw}'='__all' OR stock_status IN (${stock_status:singlequote}))
              AND stock_status = 'Low stock'

WITH latest_snapshot AS (
  SELECT max(snapshot_date) AS snapshot_date
  FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily
)
,
    stock_status AS (
      SELECT
        s.warehouse_id,
        s.sku_id,
        coalesce(w.warehouse_name, s.warehouse_id) AS warehouse,
        coalesce(p.sku_name, s.sku_id) AS sku_name,
        coalesce(p.category, 'Unknown') AS category,
        coalesce(p.brand, 'Unknown') AS brand,
        s.on_hand_qty,
        s.available_qty,
        s.reserved_qty,
        p.reorder_point,
        p.max_stock,
        round(s.inventory_value, 2) AS inventory_value,
        multiIf(
          s.available_qty <= 0, 'Stockout',
          p.reorder_point > 0 AND s.available_qty < p.reorder_point, 'Low stock',
          p.max_stock > 0 AND s.available_qty > p.max_stock, 'Overstock',
          'Healthy'
        ) AS stock_status
      FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily s
      LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product p ON p.sku_id = s.sku_id
      LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_warehouse w ON w.warehouse_id = s.warehouse_id
      WHERE s.snapshot_date = (SELECT snapshot_date FROM latest_snapshot)
        AND ('${warehouse:raw}'='__all' OR s.warehouse_id IN (${warehouse:singlequote}))
        AND ('${region:raw}'='__all' OR w.region IN (${region:singlequote}))
        AND ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR p.category IN (${category:singlequote}))
        AND ('${brand:raw}'='__all' OR p.brand IN (${brand:singlequote}))
        AND ('${sku:raw}'='__all' OR s.sku_id IN (${sku:singlequote}))
    )

            SELECT countIf(available_qty < 0) AS value
            FROM stock_status

WITH latest_snapshot AS (
  SELECT max(snapshot_date) AS snapshot_date
  FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily
),
stock_status AS (
  SELECT
    s.warehouse_id AS warehouse_id,
    s.sku_id AS sku_id,
    coalesce(w.warehouse_name, s.warehouse_id) AS warehouse,
    coalesce(p.sku_name, s.sku_id) AS sku_name,
    coalesce(p.category, 'Unknown') AS category,
    coalesce(p.brand, 'Unknown') AS brand,
    s.on_hand_qty,
    s.available_qty,
    s.reserved_qty,
    p.reorder_point,
    p.max_stock,
    round(s.inventory_value, 2) AS inventory_value,
    multiIf(
      s.available_qty <= 0, 'Stockout',
      p.reorder_point > 0 AND s.available_qty < p.reorder_point, 'Low stock',
      p.max_stock > 0 AND s.available_qty > p.max_stock, 'Overstock',
      'Healthy'
    ) AS stock_status
  FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily s
  LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product p ON p.sku_id = s.sku_id
  LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_warehouse w ON w.warehouse_id = s.warehouse_id
  WHERE s.snapshot_date = (SELECT snapshot_date FROM latest_snapshot)
    AND ('${warehouse:raw}'='__all' OR s.warehouse_id IN (${warehouse:singlequote}))
    AND ('${region:raw}'='__all' OR w.region IN (${region:singlequote}))
    AND ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR p.category IN (${category:singlequote}))
    AND ('${brand:raw}'='__all' OR p.brand IN (${brand:singlequote}))
    AND ('${sku:raw}'='__all' OR s.sku_id IN (${sku:singlequote}))
)
SELECT
  warehouse,
  sku_id,
  sku_name,
  category,
  brand,
  on_hand_qty,
  available_qty,
  reserved_qty,
  reorder_point,
  max_stock,
  stock_status,
  inventory_value
FROM stock_status
WHERE ('${stock_status:raw}'='__all' OR stock_status IN (${stock_status:singlequote}))
  AND stock_status != 'Healthy'
ORDER BY
  multiIf(stock_status = 'Stockout', 0, stock_status = 'Low stock', 1, stock_status = 'Overstock', 2, 3),
  inventory_value DESC
LIMIT 200

WITH latest_snapshot AS (
  SELECT max(snapshot_date) AS snapshot_date
  FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily
)
,
    stock_status AS (
      SELECT
        s.warehouse_id,
        s.sku_id,
        coalesce(w.warehouse_name, s.warehouse_id) AS warehouse,
        coalesce(p.sku_name, s.sku_id) AS sku_name,
        coalesce(p.category, 'Unknown') AS category,
        coalesce(p.brand, 'Unknown') AS brand,
        s.on_hand_qty,
        s.available_qty,
        s.reserved_qty,
        p.reorder_point,
        p.max_stock,
        round(s.inventory_value, 2) AS inventory_value,
        multiIf(
          s.available_qty <= 0, 'Stockout',
          p.reorder_point > 0 AND s.available_qty < p.reorder_point, 'Low stock',
          p.max_stock > 0 AND s.available_qty > p.max_stock, 'Overstock',
          'Healthy'
        ) AS stock_status
      FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily s
      LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product p ON p.sku_id = s.sku_id
      LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_warehouse w ON w.warehouse_id = s.warehouse_id
      WHERE s.snapshot_date = (SELECT snapshot_date FROM latest_snapshot)
        AND ('${warehouse:raw}'='__all' OR s.warehouse_id IN (${warehouse:singlequote}))
        AND ('${region:raw}'='__all' OR w.region IN (${region:singlequote}))
        AND ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR p.category IN (${category:singlequote}))
        AND ('${brand:raw}'='__all' OR p.brand IN (${brand:singlequote}))
        AND ('${sku:raw}'='__all' OR s.sku_id IN (${sku:singlequote}))
    )
    ,
            recent_demand AS (
              SELECT
                sku_id,
                sum(qty) AS sold_qty_30d
              FROM inventory_mart.fact_sales_order_lines
              WHERE created_date >= today() - 30
              GROUP BY sku_id
            )
            SELECT
              s.warehouse,
              s.sku_id,
              s.sku_name,
              s.category,
              s.available_qty,
              d.sold_qty_30d
            FROM stock_status s
            INNER JOIN recent_demand d ON d.sku_id = s.sku_id
            WHERE s.available_qty <= 0
            ORDER BY d.sold_qty_30d DESC
            LIMIT 30

panels.title: Zero Stock with Recent Demand (30 days)

targets.rawSql:
WITH latest_snapshot AS (
  SELECT max(snapshot_date) AS snapshot_date
  FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily
),
stock_status AS (
  SELECT
    s.warehouse_id AS warehouse_id,
    s.sku_id AS sku_id,
    coalesce(w.warehouse_name, s.warehouse_id) AS warehouse,
    coalesce(p.sku_name, s.sku_id) AS sku_name,
    coalesce(p.category, 'Unknown') AS category,
    coalesce(p.brand, 'Unknown') AS brand,
    s.on_hand_qty,
    s.available_qty,
    s.reserved_qty,
    p.reorder_point,
    p.max_stock,
    round(s.inventory_value, 2) AS inventory_value,
    multiIf(
      s.available_qty <= 0, 'Stockout',
      p.reorder_point > 0 AND s.available_qty < p.reorder_point, 'Low stock',
      p.max_stock > 0 AND s.available_qty > p.max_stock, 'Overstock',
      'Healthy'
    ) AS stock_status
  FROM inventory_mart.fact_inventory_snapshot_daily s
  LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_product p ON p.sku_id = s.sku_id
  LEFT JOIN inventory_mart.dim_warehouse w ON w.warehouse_id = s.warehouse_id
  WHERE s.snapshot_date = (SELECT snapshot_date FROM latest_snapshot)
    AND ('${warehouse:raw}'='__all' OR s.warehouse_id IN (${warehouse:singlequote}))
    AND ('${region:raw}'='__all' OR w.region IN (${region:singlequote}))
    AND ('${category:raw}'='__all' OR p.category IN (${category:singlequote}))
    AND ('${brand:raw}'='__all' OR p.brand IN (${brand:singlequote}))
    AND ('${sku:raw}'='__all' OR s.sku_id IN (${sku:singlequote}))
)
SELECT
  warehouse,
  sku_id,
  sku_name,
  category,
  available_qty,
  max_stock,
  greatest(available_qty - max_stock, 0) AS excess_qty,
  inventory_value
FROM stock_status
WHERE stock_status = 'Overstock'
ORDER BY excess_qty DESC, inventory_value DESC
LIMIT 30
